title: dialyceras coriaceum
intro: Dialyceras coriaceum, a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant's bark and roots have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Dialyceras coriaceum has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Dialyceras coriaceum typically involve boiling the roots and bark in water to create a decoction, which can be used as a treatment for various ailments.
